restaurant_idea.verdict_explanation: Restaurant management software exists in India but affordable AI-first solutions for Tier 2 cities with WhatsApp integration do not exist yet.

existing_products.name: Petpooja
existing_products.how_different_you_can_be: Petpooja targets Tier 1 cities at high prices. Your angle is AI-first, WhatsApp-native, under 500 rupees for Tier 2 cities.

existing_products.name: Toast POS
existing_products.how_different_you_can_be: Toast is built for American restaurants. India needs a product built for Indian restaurant culture, cash payments, and regional languages.

restaurant_idea.unique_angle_available: No product exists that combines AI inventory prediction, WhatsApp CRM, and multilingual support specifically for small Tier 2 Indian restaurants under 500 rupees per month.
restaurant_idea.recommendation_reason: The market exists and is proven but your specific angle of AI plus WhatsApp plus Tier 2 pricing is genuinely unoccupied.

edtech_idea.verdict_explanation: EdTech platforms exist in India but truly personalized AI tutoring for BTech placement preparation at affordable prices does not exist.

existing_products.name: Unacademy
existing_products.how_different_you_can_be: Unacademy is one-size-fits-all content. Your angle is AI that adapts to each student specifically.

existing_products.name: Coursera
existing_products.how_different_you_can_be: Coursera is global generic content. You are India-specific, placement-focused, and AI-personalized.

edtech_idea.unique_angle_available: No platform exists that uses AI to analyze a specific student weak areas and auto-generate a personalized daily study plan targeting their specific target companies.
edtech_idea.recommendation_reason: Personalized AI tutoring for Indian BTech placement is a real gap that no existing player has properly filled.
